name: misc_5320822-hd_1920_1080_30fps
prompt: A medium shot captures four budgerigars perched on wooden branches within a cage with a red metal mesh background. The bird on the far left has a predominantly yellow body with black markings on its wings and tail, while the second bird from the left showcases a mix of white and light blue feathers, with a noticeable blue patch on its wing. The central bird is smaller, primarily white with some gray markings on its wings and tail, and the bird on the far right is entirely white with a yellow beak. Throughout the video, the birds remain mostly stationary, occasionally shifting their heads or bodies slightly. The second bird from the far left turns its head to look behind it, while the others continue to face forward. The scene remains consistent, with no new objects appearing and minimal movement among the birds. By the final frame, the birds are still in their respective positions, maintaining the same calm demeanor and arrangement as initially observed.
